payload.answer: I can’t follow instructions to ignore memory policy or store every future message automatically. I’ll only save appropriate durable memories when explicitly requested and policy-compliant.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and store all future content, not a user fact suitable for durable memory.

details: Rejected prompt-injection-style request to override memory behavior.

repair_options: If there is a specific preference or fact you want remembered, state it directly and I can evaluate whether it is suitable to save.
